sentences.arabic: يَدَّخِرُ سَامِيٌّ النُّقُودَ فِي كُوزِ الخَزِّ كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Sami svake sedmice štedi novac u kasici.
sentences.translationEn: Sami saves money in his piggy bank every week.

sentences.arabic: يَضَعُ فِيهِ كُلَّ مَا يَبْقَى مِنْ مَصْرُوفِهِ.
sentences.translation: Stavlja u nju sve što ostane od džeparca.
sentences.translationEn: He puts in it everything left from his pocket money.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ شَهْرٍ فَتَحَ الكُوزَ وَعَدَّ النُّقُودَ.
sentences.translation: Nakon mjesec dana otvorio je kasicu i prebrojao novac.
sentences.translationEn: After a month he opened the piggy bank and counted the money.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ مَسْرُورًا لِأَنَّهُ جَمَعَ مَبْلَغًا جَيِّدًا.
sentences.translation: Bio je radostan jer je sakupio dobar iznos.
sentences.translationEn: He was pleased because he had saved a good amount.

sentences.translation: Odlučio je da kupi poklon za svoju majku.
sentences.translationEn: He decided to buy a gift for his mother.
